items.title: Trump has slapped a 12.5 tariff on Australian goods. What does that mean?

items.title: Petrol prices tipped to rise across Australia, squeezing household budgets

items.summary: A major review warns parts of Australia's national security laws could undermine democracy and press freedom.

items.title: Kyle Chalmers praises Gina Rinehart over bonuses amid warning to not thank billionaire

items.title: Police launch fresh appeal to identify victims of alleged childcare abuser Hamish Tait
items.summary: Police are still trying to identify a child from a Putney childcare centre in Sydney's north who was found pictured on electronic devices seized from Hamish Tait as part of the investigation.

items.title: Tony Modra's medical records allegedly inappropriately accessed by SA Health staff
items.summary: Three SA Health staff are being investigated for alleged inappropriate access to the private medical records of AFL star Tony Modra, while a further five are being "assessed" to determine whether their access to the records was appropriate.

items.summary: A Federal Court case against celebrity crocodile wrangler Matt Wright could take another year before making it to trial. The lawsuit has been brought by Danielle Wilson, the widow of Mr Wright's TV co-star Chris "Willow" Wilson, who died in a 2022 chopper crash.

items.title: TGA issues warning over GLP-1-based drugs potential to cause rare eye disorder
items.summary: The Therapeutic Goods Administration has issued a safety warning for a rare, but serious risk of vision impairment from taking GLP-1-based drugs such as Ozempic and Wegovy.
